---
title: "Felipe José Miguel Garcia"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/felipejmgarcia
    - icon: google-scholar
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0000-0000-0000
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:your.email@example.com
---

## Bio

I am an academic researcher focused on [Environmental Economics / Public Policy], with a particular interest in [e.g., Brazilian Amazon deforestation, public expenditure analysis]. My research combines [Econometrics / Data Science] with large-scale administrative datasets.

Currently, I am [Your Position] at [Your Institution].

## Research Interests

- **Environmental Economics**: Deforestation dynamics, land use, and sustainability policies.
- **Public Policy Evaluation**: Impact of government spending on regional development.
- **Data Science in Economics**: Applied econometrics and causal inference.

## Latest News

- **March 2026**: Presented my work on Amazonian deforestation at [Conference Name].
- **February 2026**: My new paper, "[Paper Title]", was accepted for publication in *[Journal Name]*.

## Education

**University Name** | PhD in Economics | [Year] – [Year]
**University Name** | MSc in Applied Economics | [Year] – [Year]
**University Name** | BSc in Economics | [Year] – [Year]

## Experience

**Organization Name** | Research Associate | [Year] – Present
**Organization Name** | Data Analyst | [Year] – [Year]
